phase_2_status: NOT STARTED — context stored, awaiting orchestration

stack.backend: FastAPI / Python 3.12 / UV / PostgreSQL 16 (Supabase managed) / SQLAlchemy / Alembic
stack.frontend: React 18 / Vite / Tailwind CSS / shadcn/ui / Zustand / React Router v6 / Axios
stack.infra: Docker + docker-compose + Nginx (NO local PostgreSQL — removed per Path B)

architecture_note: CRITICAL — Path B: Supabase project asgofjauortyigsoliii provides BOTH Auth + PostgreSQL. NO Docker PostgreSQL. profiles table FKs directly to auth.users(id). No shadow auth_users table. See phase-2-context.json § architectural_decision_path_b.
auth_note: CRITICAL: Auth is Supabase, not Google/Microsoft OAuth2. Frontend routes: /login, /register. Backend validates Supabase JWT via FastAPI dependency.
unresolved_conflict: QUESTIONNAIRE: PLAN.md (10 sections, 43 questions, yes/no/partial/na) vs Frontend code (3 blocks, 11 questions, scale 0/35/70/100). MUST ask user before implementing. See phase-2-context.json § plan_vs_frontend_conflict.
phase_1_deliverables: Supabase register + login + JWT validation + protected routes
phase_2_deliverables: SQLAlchemy models: profiles, companies, company_members, + audit tables
Alembic migration with ENUMs, FKs (RESTRICT), composite UNIQUEs, indexes
Frontend forced onboarding flow (company creation, selection)
critical_conventions: Backend path: backend/app/ | Frontend path: frontend/src/
All DB queries must be tenant-scoped
pytest ≥ 70% coverage backend; vitest + Playwright frontend
Path B: profiles FK → auth.users(id), no shadow table
Path B: Use pooler URL for app, direct URL for migrations
